message:
feat(tui): implement interactive flow matrix view with j/k/h/l navigation

Wire up the FlowMatrix view mode with full functionality:
- ] key toggles FlowMatrix mode (added to help overlay)
- j/k navigate rows, h/l navigate columns in the matrix
- flow_matrix_list_text() renders a formatted ASCII matrix with
  cursor markers, column headers, bottleneck summary, and cell
  highlighting for the selected row/col intersection
- flow_matrix_detail_text() shows per-cell details: label issues
  for diagonal cells, cross-label dependency breakdowns with issue
  IDs and titles for off-diagonal cells
- Footer bar shows label count and cross-dep count
- compute_flow_matrix() delegates to compute_cross_label_flow()
- 3 new tests: toggle, navigation, and render content validation
- flow_matrix_shortcut_focus() helper gates navigation to FlowMatrix mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
